parameters.name: グチョグチョフリー/指くちょ2

parameters: (A woman's voice is heard from inside.
“I don’t have anything to do here, right?”
“I don’t have anything to do here, right?”
“I don’t have anything to do here, right?”
“I don’t have anything to do here, right?”
“I don’t have anything to do here, right?”
“I don’t have anything to do here, right?”
“I don’t have anything to do here, right?”
“Come on Otaku-kun, are you doing this on purpose?”
"It's so bold of you to have sex with me in the girls' bathroom at school."
“Otaku-kun, you did it on purpose, right?”
“Are you going to drag me into the women’s bathroom just because no one is there?
...If it wasn't for me, you would've been really angry, right? ♡”
“Are you going to the bathroom, Otaku-kun?…Then I’ll be waiting for you.
(I don't feel like that right now.)
"Otaku-kun, do you want to go to the janitor's room?"
